Rock store fits up to 120 kg stones.. EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD black EOS Herkules Fragrance Vaporizer dish arrangement with an integrated water supply. Herkules Fragrance is designed for retrofitting onto the EOS sauna heater EOS Herkules XL S120. On this sauna heater, it is mounted in the middle of the left and right side wall. It is designed to be filled with water and, if necessary, any doses of sauna infusion preparations or essential oils. No flammable substances/materials may be placed in the dishes. Herkules Fragrance is designed for operation with an upstream automatic vaporizer dosing unit that controls the water filling quantity, the dosing cycle and the quantity of aromas. . Item no. 946826

EOS Herkules XL S120 HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD Floor-standing model with integrated vaporizer for flexible climate forms. Rock store fits up to 12
products.full_description: EOS Herkules XL S120 HD Floor-standing model for the Finnish (dry) sauna. Rock store fits up to 120 kg stones. EOS Herkules XL S120 HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD Floor-standing model with integrated vaporizer for flexible climate forms. Rock store fits up to 120 kg stones.. EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD black EOS Herkules Fragrance Vaporizer dish arrangement with an integrated water supply. Herkules Fragrance is designed for retrofitting onto the EOS sauna heater EOS Herkules XL S120. On this sauna heater, it is mounted in the middle of the left and right side wall. It is designed to be filled with water and, if necessary, any doses of sauna infusion preparations or essential oils. No flammable substances/materials may be placed in the dishes. Herkules Fragrance is designed for operation with an upstream automatic vaporizer dosing unit that controls the water filling quantity, the dosing cycle and the quantity of aromas. . Item no. 946826

products.full_description: EOS Herkules XL S120 HD Floor-standing model for the Finnish (dry) sauna. Rock store fits up to 120 kg stones. EOS Herkules XL S120 HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD Floor-standing model with integrated vaporizer for flexible climate forms. Rock store fits up to 120 kg stones.. EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD black EOS Herkules Fragrance Vaporizer dish arrangement with an integrated water supply. Herkules Fragrance is designed for retrofitting onto the EOS sauna heater EOS Herkules XL S120. On this sauna heater, it is mounted in the middle of the left and right side wall. It is designed to be filled with water and, if necessary, any doses of sauna infusion preparations or essential oils. No flammable substances/materials may be placed in the dishes. Herkules Fragrance is designed for operation with an upstream automatic vaporizer dosing unit that controls the water filling quantity, the dosing cycle and the quantity of aromas. . Item no. 946826

products.short_description: Electronic sauna control unit for dry and humid sauna operation (H-variant for sauna heaters with vaporizer) with a large LCD display with multi-language menu navigation and new innovative functions. Particularly suitable for advanced commercial sauna cabins.
products.full_description: Electronic sauna control unit for dry and humid sauna operation (H-variant for sauna heaters with vaporizer) with a large LCD display with multi-language menu navigation and new innovative functions. Particularly suitable for advanced commercial sauna cabins. Extra-large, multi-line LCD display, all parameters at a glance. With 24 h pre-set timer in real time. Menu navigation in 12 languages, clock, output for cabin light 230V, Life-Guard function, remaining heating time display. With keypad lock (child lock). Safety temperature limitation 139 °C. Unlimited heating time (for commercial use). Switching power 9 kW, may be extended for connection of more powerful heaters. Inc. temperature sensor with 2 m cable. Humidity sensor optional. The H-variant additionally with humidity control and output for vaporizer. Humidity control on time basis, adjustable in 10 steps. With low water recognition, after-heating and sauna dry function after the humid operation. Control range: 30 °C - 70 °C (dry mode) and 30 °C - 115 °C (humid mode). Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 9 kW (power extension possible). Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Humidity mode (H4): 6 kW + 3 kW for vaporizer equipment. Can be expanded via the connection of power switching devices

products.source_name: Sound module (SBM-S BT ) SBM-S BT sound module with Bluetooth
products.short_description: The module features an integrated stereo amplifier 2 x 15 W and an integrated MP3 player. Wall-mounting unit.
products.full_description: The module features an integrated stereo amplifier 2 x 15 W and an integrated MP3 player. Wall-mounting unit. Music files can be retrieved from an SD-card, USB connection or via Bluetooth (only BT version) or an analogue input. A NF 3,5 mm analogue music jack is also available for music streaming. Connection to sauna control unit via sauna bus, own 230 V power supply. Optional USB docking station for mounting in the sauna wall.

products.short_description: With the extended EOS Spa Control App, various other cabin types in addition to a sauna cabin, such as steam rooms, hammams and infrared cabins can be conveniently controlled in connection with one SBM-App module each while on the move, regardless of whether you‘re sitting in your car on the way hom
products.full_description: With the extended EOS Spa Control App, various other cabin types in addition to a sauna cabin, such as steam rooms, hammams and infrared cabins can be conveniently controlled in connection with one SBM-App module each while on the move, regardless of whether you‘re sitting in your car on the way home from grocery shopping, returning from a trip and just landing at the airport, or heading home after a hard day of work. A quick check of the current sauna condition like its temperature or remaining heating time is easily possible. Management of several cabins is also possible. Further features are the different preset profiles for the sauna, which can be customized with just a few clicks. For even more control, the temperature of the bench sensor can be accessed and the status of the drying program for sauna, steam room or hammam can be queried. Moreover, the potential-free contact can be controlled via app and can e. g. regulate an additional light source. Notice: In order to also control steam rooms, IR cabins and hammams with the app, you need to update the firmware of your control unit. Further information can be found in the manual or here . The EOS Spa Control App will automatically detect the paired sauna control unit and adjust its interface for a simple and intuitive operation. Currently supported mobile devices: Android and Apple iOS. Compact size module with pre-mounted cable for connection to the sauna control unit . RJ45 connector for internet connection. With status LEDs for network activity. No separate power supply needed. Delivery does not include a smartphone or a tablet-PC. Requires the installation of the EOS Spa Control App . Internet connection required at initial setup. If you switch on the heater using pre-set timers or a remote control, an additional safety system is required. This safety measure could be a cover protection rail on the heater, a door supervision device or another type of technical equipment (e.g. cover guard, EOSafe ). 1 x 10/100 Base-T Ethernet RJ45 jack, shielded

products.source_name: Coloured light module (SBM-FL75/150) SBM-FL75 module coloured light, 67,5 W
products.short_description: Allows to connect and control almost any RGB or white light LED light (e.g. LED-spots, LED-strips, etc.) via sauna control unit . No driver needed, LEDs are connected directly to the module.
products.full_description: Allows to connect and control almost any RGB or white light LED light (e.g. LED-spots, LED-strips, etc.) via sauna control unit . No driver needed, LEDs are connected directly to the module. Compatible with voltage-controlled (0 - 24 V) and with current controlled (0 - 3000 mA) LED lamps. Output: RGB (3 separately adjustable channels) and white light (may be synchronized with the main light). In Emotec design housing. Available with two power outputs: 67,5 W and 135 W . Max 3 A per channel. Not compatible with RGB LED strips with the common “+“ line.

products.source_name: Coloured light module (SBM-FL75/150) SBM-FL150 module coloured light, 135 W
products.short_description: Allows to connect and control almost any RGB or white light LED light (e.g. LED-spots, LED-strips, etc.) via sauna control unit . No driver needed, LEDs are connected directly to the module.
products.full_description: Allows to connect and control almost any RGB or white light LED light (e.g. LED-spots, LED-strips, etc.) via sauna control unit . Output: RGB (3 separately adjustable channels) and white light (may be synchronized with the main light). In Emotec design housing. Available with two power outputs: 67,5 W and 135 W . Max 3 A per channel. Not compatible with RGB LED strips with the common “+“ line.

products.short_description: Luxury class digital control system for private and commercial operation. For dry and humid sauna operation with humidity control (for all EOS Bi-O type sauna heaters ).
products.full_description: Luxury class digital control system for private and commercial operation. For dry and humid sauna operation with humidity control (for all EOS Bi-O type sauna heaters ). Features a special design display panel with glass front, colour TFT display and a stylish wooden inlay cut of maple or walnut with capacitive buttons. With the remote display panel and separated relay box. Innovative operating concept allows quick and intuitive operation. For installations inside sauna cabins. All functions as the EOS EmoStyle D / H control unit. Choice of 4 designs of the display panel: The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. Thanks to the EOS Cloud connection, the control unit is always up to date via over-the-air software updates. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. WiFi and cloud capable– always up to date with the latest software. Integrated WiFi dongle allows easy pairing. Connection option for the door contact safety system to monitor door status. Extended control with the EOS Spa Control App. 10,0 kW (can be expanded with LSG: LSG 10 / LSG 18 / LSG 36)

products.short_description: Large multi-line LCD display, menu navigation in 12 languages, guided setup, all parameters at a glance.
products.full_description: Large multi-line LCD display, menu navigation in 12 languages, guided setup, all parameters at a glance. Temperature control 30 °C - 50°C, hysteresis adjustable 1 - 5 K, heating time 6 h / 12 h / unlimited, output for light and extractor fan (230 V), timer (single event or automatic recurring switching), control for essence dosing (intensity and intervals), special functions. Wall-mounting installation. Temperature sensor with 5 m cable included in delivery.

products.short_description: Advanced control system for private and commercial operation. Features an exclusive display panel with glass front, colour TFT display, capacitive buttons and separate power unit. Available in white and black design. Thanks to the innovative operating concept, the unit can be operated intuitively an
products.full_description: Advanced control system for private and commercial operation. Features an exclusive display panel with glass front, colour TFT display, capacitive buttons and separate power unit. Available in white and black design. Thanks to the innovative operating concept, the unit can be operated intuitively and quickly, and numerous functions can be reached and set very quickly. H-version additionally with humidity control. For all EOS Bi-O type sauna heaters . Humidity control - either in proportional to time way (allows constant steam production per given time) or with an optional humidity sensor as per relative air humidity (allows exact humidity setting per rel. air humidity in %). Output for vaporizer up to 3 kW. With water shortage detection. Quick selection between dry sauna or humid sauna operation modes with a jog-dial. With the additional convenient features: The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. Thanks to the EOS Cloud connection, the control unit is always up to date via over-the-air software updates. Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. 10,0 kW (can be expanded with LSG: LSG 10 / LSG 18 / LSG 36) 230 V, ohmic, capacitive, inductive load. Digital, inc. 5 m cable. Bench sensor optional. 132 x 135 x 25 mm installation assembly (mounting - optional)

products.short_description: EmoTouch, once launched as a classic sauna control unit, has grown in the 4th generation to a sophisticated scalable wellness management system. Now, the EOS EmoTouch 3 allows control of a wide range of wellness applications, thanks to the separate LSG modules.
products.full_description: EmoTouch, once launched as a classic sauna control unit, has grown in the 4th generation to a sophisticated scalable wellness management system. Now, the EOS EmoTouch 3 allows control of a wide range of wellness applications, thanks to the separate LSG modules. Combine the cabins as you wish and require: In every cabin you can regulate not only the heating, but many additional features like cabin light, ventilation and the special extension modules allow control of LED colour light effects, music and much more. 10,0 kW resistive load (extension possible: PEB 10 / PEB 18 / PEB 36), 3,0 kW for vaporizer in humid sauna mode. Proportional to time (0 - 100%) or with humidity sensor (rel. %) 230 V, dimmable. Resistive, capacitive, inductive load Digital, inc. 5 m cable. 2nd sensor and humidity sensor optional.

products.short_description: EmoTouch, once launched as a classic sauna control unit, has grown in the 4th generation to a sophisticated scalable wellness management system. Now, the EOS EmoTouch 3 allows control of a wide range of wellness applications, thanks to the separate LSG modules.
products.full_description: EmoTouch, once launched as a classic sauna control unit, has grown in the 4th generation to a sophisticated scalable wellness management system. Now, the EOS EmoTouch 3 allows control of a wide range of wellness applications, thanks to the separate LSG modules. Combine the cabins as you wish and require: In every cabin you can regulate not only the heating, but many additional features like cabin light, ventilation and the special extension modules allow control of LED colour light effects, music and much more. 10,0 kW resistive load (extension possible: PEB 10 / PEB 18 / PEB 36), 3,0 kW for vaporizer in humid sauna mode. Proportional to time (0 - 100%) or with humidity sensor (rel. %) 230 V, dimmable. Resistive, capacitive, inductive load Digital, inc. 5 m cable. 2nd sensor and humidity sensor optional.

products.short_description: Allows to connect an additional sauna cabin and control it from the existing EOS EmoTouch 3 display panel.
products.full_description: Allows to connect an additional sauna cabin and control it from the existing EOS EmoTouch 3 display panel. Up to 8 separate saunas (and/or steam rooms) may be connected to one display panel. Includes digital temperature sensor with 5 m cable. Includes 10 m sauna bus connection cable. Supports dry and humid sauna operation. 9 kW switching capacity.

products.short_description: Allows to control a hammam as an additional cabin from the existing EOS EmoTouch 3 display panel.
products.full_description: Allows to control a hammam as an additional cabin from the existing EOS EmoTouch 3 display panel. Up to 8 separate cabins ( sauna , steam room, hammam) may be connected to one EmoTouch 3 display panel. Includes 3 digital temperature sensor with 5 m cable for floor, bench and wall temperature control. Temperature control range. Three separate 3 kW outputs for floor, bench and wall heating. Includes 10 m sauna bus connection cable.

products.short_description: The module for EOS Compact, EmoTec, EmoStyle, U-Command and EmoTouch 3 sauna control systems provides commercial sauna operators with a highly practical function.
products.full_description: The module for EOS Compact, EmoTec, EmoStyle, U-Command and EmoTouch 3 sauna control systems provides commercial sauna operators with a highly practical function. SBM-Hot module provides a power boost, which will run the sauna heater at full power up in 20 minutes, regardless of the current temperature (however only up to max. 125°C). This can be used, for instance, before an “Aufguss” water splash ceremony to keep the stones better reheated. The module includes a stylish flush-mounting stainless steel push-button with an illuminated ring, a pre-mounted 10 m cable and a small electronic board (RJ12 connector).

products.short_description: LSG Infrared allows to control a separate infrared cabin with the existing EmoTouch 3 display panel.
products.full_description: LSG Infrared allows to control a separate infrared cabin with the existing EmoTouch 3 display panel. 3 outputs (2 x dimmable, 1 x switchable) - can be controlled individually or bundled in groups. Temperature control as per air temperature or by feeling through zone dimming. Delivery includes : 10 m sauna bus connection cable, digital temperature sensor with 5 m cable, 230 V power adaptor (requires 2 power supplies).

products.short_description: The SBM-IR module allows to control both the sauna and the infrared heating equipment from only one control panel. Universally suitable for all type of IR emitters and foils.
products.full_description: The SBM-IR module allows to control both the sauna and the infrared heating equipment from only one control panel. Universally suitable for all type of IR emitters and foils. Allows 3 operation modes: sauna, infrared, sauna + infrared. 30°-70° with sensor or by intensity through dimming of IR emitters

products.short_description: The new module for EOS EmoTec, EOS EmoStyle and EOS EmoTouch 3 sauna control systems provides commercial sauna operators with a highly practical function.
products.full_description: The new module for EOS EmoTec, EOS EmoStyle and EOS EmoTouch 3 sauna control systems provides commercial sauna operators with a highly practical function. SBM-Eco is a power-saving mode with manual or automatic operation. Durable metal housing, flush-mounting installation. With illumination ring in green. Set includes: push button with external electronic unit and connection cable.

products.short_description: Based on the proven EOS EmoStyle sauna control unit construction. For private and commercial operation.

products.short_description: The KNX- / Modbus module allows integrating your sauna cabin into the central BMS system using the KNX or Modbus communication protocols.
products.full_description: The KNX- / Modbus module allows integrating your sauna cabin into the central BMS system using the KNX or Modbus communication protocols. Suitable for EOS Compact DC/HC/D18/H18, EOS EmoTec, EOS EmoStyle , EOS U-Command and EOS EmoTouch 3 series. Allows remote control for: sauna heater (also with vaporizer), temperature and humidity, light with dimming, volt-free output switching, monitoring of temperature and humidity, sauna status etc. Very simple to install. Connection to sauna control unit via sauna bus connector.

products.short_description: The SBM-IR Relay module is the preferred means of operation for infrared foils in infrared and/or sauna cabins. Emitters may also be connected. The (dimmable) IR module or IR relay box is recommended for emitters. Five separate circuits with a total output of max. 3.5 kW, can be freely defined – all
products.full_description: The SBM-IR Relay module is the preferred means of operation for infrared foils in infrared and/or sauna cabins. Emitters may also be connected. The (dimmable) IR module or IR relay box is recommended for emitters. Five separate circuits with a total output of max. 3.5 kW, can be freely defined – all non-dimmable. Suitable for domestic and commercial use. Wall-mounting installation outside of the cabin. 5 separate circuits with a total output of 3.5 kW, can be freely defined – all non-dimmable 4 x RJ12 jack for control panel and add-on modules

products.short_description: The sauna control unit, with a power output of 10 kW (extendable with a power extension unit), combines a wide range of features with a simple and intuitive operating concept. Easily and quickly control not only the temperature of your sauna heater but also the cabin lighting via four direct selecti
products.full_description: The sauna control unit, with a power output of 10 kW (extendable with a power extension unit), combines a wide range of features with a simple and intuitive operating concept. Easily and quickly control not only the temperature of your sauna heater but also the cabin lighting via four direct selection buttons and six softkeys. The 3.5" TFT display clearly shows all key parameters at a glance. This control unit offers an extensive feature set with numerous comfort functions, including a convenient pre-set timer with safety lock, four customizable user profiles, connections for lighting and ventilation, a control lock, a safety temperature limiter (139 °C), remaining time display, 24-hour pre-set timer, heating time limitation (6 hrs / 12 hrs / 18 hrs / unlimited), and a holiday home mode. For added personalization, this control series is available in arctic white or modern anthracite, as a version for traditional Finnish (dry) sauna operation, or as a combi-control unit for both dry and humid operation. Each version supports 10 kW and offers different feature levels. The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. Thanks to the EOS Cloud connection, the control unit is always up to date via over-the-air software updates. Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration.

products.short_description: Provides the additional 10 kW switching capacity.
products.full_description: Provides the additional 10 kW switching capacity. New, improved construction with wall-mounting "EOS Compact"-housing, connections at the bottom or back side. Low-noise operation. In combination with a 9 kW (10 kW) sauna control unit suitable for twin-circuit sauna heaters up to 19 kW (20 kW) power (with 18 kW capable sauna control units – up to 28 kW , except “HD” type sauna heaters).

products.short_description: Illuminated alphanumeric LCD-Display (time, functions, error messages), multi-language menu navigation.
products.full_description: Illuminated alphanumeric LCD-Display (time, functions, error messages), multi-language menu navigation. Temperature control range 30 °C - 70 °C. Control unit features 2 dimmable heating circuits and one non-dimmable output (e.g. foot zone). Switch for cabin light. Flush-mounting display panel, wall-mounting relay box. Temperature sensor with cable and 2 m display connection cable are included. Switching capacity up to 3.5 kW. With an optional sensor for infrared heating foils , the temperature control basing on the foil temperature is possible.

products.source_name: EOS U-Command D10 – For dry (Finnish) sauna – 10 kW black
products.short_description: The control system that makes wellness simple.
products.full_description: The control system that makes wellness simple. With EOS U-Command, you can operate your wellness cabin easily, safely, and as individually as you wish. With EOS U-Command, you see only what matters: start, temperature, humidity, and runtime – all clear, logical, and easy to access. A single tap launches your wellness experience, while personalized user profiles save your preferences for ultimate comfort and convenience. Manage up to two cabins from a single control panel – safely and effortlessly. Whether it’s for sauna, infrared, hybrid sauna, steam room, or hammam, one intuitive system handles it all. Safety and service – automatically connected The EOS Cloud enhances your control system with smart features that make operation simpler and safer. Private users benefit from automatic updates and fast service support – all without any effort. Operators gain a central overview of all systems and locations via the web-based Cloud portal. This allows service teams to plan and perform maintenance, analysis, and updates directly online – efficiently, safely, and without downtime. Thanks to Wi-Fi and Cloud connectivity, your control unit updates itself automatically. New features and security updates are installed automatically, without any on-site intervention – keeping your system reliable and future-proof. Learn more about the EOS Cloud and schedule your personal demo. Our experts are ready to show you all the possibilities the EOS Cloud has to offer. Request your demo now and experience EOS Cloud 10,0 kW (can be expanded with: PEB 10 / PEB 18 / PEB 36), 24 h real time or week timer with two programs per day 230 V /max. 100 W, dimmable. ohmic, capacitive, inductive load.

products.short_description: The sauna control unit, with a power output of 10 kW (extendable with a power extension unit), combines a wide range of features with a simple and intuitive operating concept. Easily and quickly control not only the temperature of your sauna heater but also the cabin lighting via four direct selecti
products.full_description: The sauna control unit, with a power output of 10 kW (extendable with a power extension unit), combines a wide range of features with a simple and intuitive operating concept. Easily and quickly control not only the temperature of your sauna heater but also the cabin lighting via four direct selection buttons and six softkeys. The 3.5" TFT display clearly shows all key parameters at a glance. This control unit offers an extensive feature set with numerous comfort functions, including a convenient pre-set timer with safety lock, four customizable user profiles, connections for lighting and ventilation, a control lock, a safety temperature limiter (139 °C), remaining time display, 24-hour pre-set timer, heating time limitation (6 hrs / 12 hrs / 18 hrs / unlimited), and a holiday home mode. For added personalization, this control series is available in arctic white or modern anthracite, as a version for traditional Finnish (dry) sauna operation, or as a combi-control unit for both dry and humid operation. Each version supports 10 kW and offers different feature levels. The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. Thanks to the EOS Cloud connection, the control unit is always up to date via over-the-air software updates. Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration.

products.short_description: Advanced control system for private and commercial operation. Features an exclusive display panel with glass front, colour TFT display, capacitive buttons and separate power unit. Available in white and black design. Thanks to the innovative operating concept, the unit can be operated intuitively an
products.full_description: Advanced control system for private and commercial operation. Features an exclusive display panel with glass front, colour TFT display, capacitive buttons and separate power unit. Available in white and black design. Thanks to the innovative operating concept, the unit can be operated intuitively and quickly, and numerous functions can be reached and set very quickly. H-version additionally with humidity control. For all EOS Bi-O type sauna heaters . Humidity control - either in proportional to time way (allows constant steam production per given time) or with an optional humidity sensor as per relative air humidity (allows exact humidity setting per rel. air humidity in %). Output for vaporizer up to 3 kW. With water shortage detection. Quick selection between dry sauna or humid sauna operation modes with a jog-dial. With the additional convenient features: The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. products.source_name: EOS EmoStyle Hi Cloud maple white
products.short_description: Luxury class digital control system for private and commercial operation. For dry and humid sauna operation with humidity control (for all EOS Bi-O type sauna heaters ).
products.full_description: Luxury class digital control system for private and commercial operation. For dry and humid sauna operation with humidity control (for all EOS Bi-O type sauna heaters ). Features a special design display panel with glass front, colour TFT display and a stylish wooden inlay cut of maple or walnut with capacitive buttons. With the remote display panel and separated relay box. Innovative operating concept allows quick and intuitive operation. For installations inside sauna cabins. All functions as the EOS EmoStyle D / H control unit. Choice of 4 designs of the display panel: The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. Thanks to the EOS Cloud connection, the control unit is always up to date via over-the-air software updates. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. WiFi and cloud capable– always up to date with the latest software. Integrated WiFi dongle allows easy pairing. Connection option for the door contact safety system to monitor door status. Extended control with the EOS Spa Control App. 10,0 kW (can be expanded with LSG: LSG 10 / LSG 18 / LSG 36)

products.short_description: With this module, you can switch your sauna from a remote location (e.g. hotel reception).
products.full_description: With this module, you can switch your sauna from a remote location (e.g. hotel reception). Includes wooden button panel with the illuminated button (illumination indicates operation conditions, e.g. on, off, error), mounting frame, hollow box and control board. 10 m connection cable (6P6C) is also included.

products.short_description: The control system that makes wellness simple.
products.full_description: The control system that makes wellness simple. With EOS U-Command, you can operate your wellness cabin easily, safely, and as individually as you wish. With EOS U-Command, you see only what matters: start, temperature, humidity, and runtime – all clear, logical, and easy to access. A single tap launches your wellness experience, while personalized user profiles save your preferences for ultimate comfort and convenience. Manage up to two cabins from a single control panel – safely and effortlessly. Whether it’s for sauna, infrared, hybrid sauna, steam room, or hammam, one intuitive system handles it all. Safety and service – automatically connected The EOS Cloud enhances your control system with smart features that make operation simpler and safer. Private users benefit from automatic updates and fast service support – all without any effort. Operators gain a central overview of all systems and locations via the web-based Cloud portal. This allows service teams to plan and perform maintenance, analysis, and updates directly online – efficiently, safely, and without downtime. Thanks to Wi-Fi and Cloud connectivity, your control unit updates itself automatically. New features and security updates are installed automatically, without any on-site intervention – keeping your system reliable and future-proof. Learn more about the EOS Cloud and schedule your personal demo. Our experts are ready to show you all the possibilities the EOS Cloud has to offer. Request your demo now and experience EOS Cloud 10,0 kW (can be expanded with: PEB 10 / PEB 18 / PEB 36), 24 h real time or week timer with two programs per day 230 V /max. 100 W, dimmable. ohmic, capacitive, inductive load.

products.short_description: Simple, clearer arrangement of the installed components. More space for connections thanks to the more compact design of the circuit boards.
products.full_description: Simple, clearer arrangement of the installed components. More space for connections thanks to the more compact design of the circuit boards. Provides the additional 18 kW (18 + 6 kW) switching capacity. New improved construction. Very quiet in operation. Wall-mounting housing, connections at the rear or at the bottom side possible. In combination with a 9 kW (10 kW) sauna control unit suitable for twin-circuit sauna heaters up to 27 kW (28 kW) power (with EOS Compact D18/H18 – up to 36 kW ). Fuse links are included in the scope of delivery! Switching capacity – vaporizer (only LSG 18 H)

products.short_description: Illuminated alphanumeric LCD-Display (time, functions, error messages). Temperature control range 30 °C - 70 °C. Variable heating time 1 - 99 min. Switch for cabin light. Integrated main on/off switch. Flush-mounting installation.
products.full_description: Illuminated alphanumeric LCD-Display (time, functions, error messages). Temperature control range 30 °C - 70 °C. Variable heating time 1 - 99 min. Switch for cabin light. Integrated main on/off switch. Flush-mounting installation. Delivery includes temperature sensor with 3 m cable. Available with the pre-mounted cable set: pre-mounted power supply mains cable with plug, 3-core cable for cabin light and connection cable for IR heaters. Alternatively also available without cable set (only controller and sensor). The max. switching capacity 3.5 kW may be extended with an optional power extension modules.

Available with the pre-mounted cable set: pre-mounted power supply mains cable with plug, 3-core cable for cabin light and connection cable for IR heaters. Alternatively also available without cable set (only controller and sensor). The max. switching capacity 3.5 kW may be extended with an optional power extension modules.

products.short_description: EOS Econ is a versatile series of modern sauna control units featuring a large scope of functions and a contemporary, slim-shape design. Thanks to the modern electronic relays EOS Econ control units have very low noise operation. They are compliant with the latest safety norms in Europe and have bee
products.full_description: EOS Econ is a versatile series of modern sauna control units featuring a large scope of functions and a contemporary, slim-shape design. Thanks to the modern electronic relays EOS Econ control units have very low noise operation. They are compliant with the latest safety norms in Europe and have been independently tested and approved for quality and safety. Illuminated alphanumeric LCD-Display (time, functions, error messages), temperature control range 30 °C - 70 °C. Menu navigation in 12 languages. Heating time limitation 12 h (1 minute step), keypad lock, switch for cabin light. Suitable for nearly all models of infrared heaters and foils. This model stands out thanks to the very large 9 kW switching capacity and is a great choice for large infrared cabins. Slim housing for wall-mounting or semi-recessed installation. Temperature sensor with 2 m cable is included.

products.short_description: Advanced control unit for private and commercial operation with a remote control panel and a separate relay box. Includes digital sensor with 5 m cable. Innovative operation concept with jog-dial switch, quick access to all functions. The display panel may be installed remotely at up to 100 m distan
products.full_description: Advanced control unit for private and commercial operation with a remote control panel and a separate relay box. Includes digital sensor with 5 m cable. Innovative operation concept with jog-dial switch, quick access to all functions. The display panel may be installed remotely at up to 100 m distance. Modern TFT colour display with menu navigation in 19 languages. H-version additionally with humidity control. For all EOS Bi-O type sauna heaters . Humidity control - either in proportional to time way (allows constant steam production per given time) or with an optional humidity sensor as per relative air humidity (allows exact humidity setting per rel. air humidity in %). Output for vaporizer up to 3 kW. With water shortage detection. Quick selection between dry sauna or humid sauna operation modes with a jog-dial. With the additional convenient features: The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. Thanks to the EOS Cloud connection, the control unit is always up to date via over-the-air software updates. Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. 10,0 kW resistive load (extension possible: PEB 10 / PEB 18 / PEB 36), 3,0 kW for vaporizer in humid sauna mode Proportional to time (0 - 100%) or with humidity sensor (rel. %) 230 V / min 5 W, max 100 W, dimmable. Resistive loads Digital, inc. 5 m cable. 2nd sensor optional. Hum. sens. optional

products.short_description: Control unit for dry and humid sauna operation (H-variant for sauna heaters with vaporizer) with LCD display with multi-language menu navigation. Affordable value model with all essential control functions.
products.full_description: Control unit for dry and humid sauna operation (H-variant for sauna heaters with vaporizer) with LCD display with multi-language menu navigation. Affordable value model with all essential control functions. Modern, slim housing for surface or semi-recessed mounting. Cable connections at the rear side. Illuminated, high contrast LCD display with menu navigation in 12 languages, clock, output for cabin light 230 V, heating time limitation up to 6 h, Life-Guard function, remaining heating time display. With keypad lock (child lock). Safety temperature limitation 139 °C. Inc. temperature sensor with 2 m cable. The H-variant additionally with humidity control and output for vaporizer. Humidity control on time basis, adjustable in 10 steps. With low water recognition, after-heating and sauna dry function after the humid operation. Control range: 30 °C - 70 °C (dry mode) and 30 °C - 115 °C (humid mode). Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for private use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 9 kW. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Humidity mode: 6 kW + 3 kW for vaporizer equipment (H1)

products.short_description: You can control the temperature of your sauna heater and light in the cabin very easily and quickly using the multifunctional buttons. The 3.5 “TFT colour display clearly shows all important parameters at a glance.
products.full_description: You can control the temperature of your sauna heater and light in the cabin very easily and quickly using the multifunctional buttons. The 3.5 “TFT colour display clearly shows all important parameters at a glance. The control offers a wide range of functions with numerous comfort functions, for example a practical time preset in combination with a safety device, the setup of four different user profiles, a display for remaining time, a 24 h pre-set timer, an operation lock, a safety temperature limit (139°C), an output for cabin light and fan, as well as heating time limitation (6 h / 12 h / 18 h / unlimited) and a holiday home mode. The control unit impresses with its modern and elegant design and with its flat housing. Flexible mounting options - wall mounting and partially recessed mounting. Available in arctic white and anthracite. Available for Finnish sauna and sauna with humidity operation, each with 10 kW and various function levels. Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O).

Modern TFT colour display with menu navigation in 19 languages. H-version additionally with humidity control. For all EOS Bi-O type sauna heaters . Humidity control - either in proportional to time way (allows constant steam production per given time) or with an optional humidity sensor as per relative air humidity (allows exact humidity setting per rel. air humidity in %). Output for vaporizer up to 3 kW. With water shortage detection. Quick selection between dry sauna or humid sauna operation modes with a jog-dial. With the additional convenient features: The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. Thanks to the EOS Cloud connection, the control unit is always up to date via over-the-air software updates. Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. 10,0 kW resistive load (extension possible: PEB 10 / PEB 18 / PEB 36), 3,0 kW for vaporizer in humid sauna mode Proportional to time (0 - 100%) or with humidity sensor (rel. %) 230 V / min 5 W, max 100 W, dimmable. Resistive loads Digital, inc. 5 m cable. 2nd sensor optional. Hum. sens. optional

products.short_description: Control unit for infrared cabins with 3 outputs and dimming function.
products.full_description: Control unit for infrared cabins with 3 outputs and dimming function. Premium class electronic control unit for IR cabins with 3 separate outputs and dimming function. For private and commercial use. Based on the proven EOS EmoTec sauna control unit construction.

products.short_description: Blower fan DN100 (80 W T50), with a non-return valve and a separate 5-speed rpm controller.
products.full_description: Blower fan DN100 (80 W T50), with a non-return valve and a separate 5-speed rpm controller. 65 / 85 W incl. transformer for 5 step operation

products.short_description: Extractor fan DN 100 (12.5 - 15W) 230V 50 Hz. Plastic housing, white.
products.full_description: Extractor fan DN 100 (12.5 - 15W) 230V 50 Hz. Plastic housing, white.

products.short_description: Available alternatively in plastic or in stainless steel version.
products.full_description: Available alternatively in plastic or in stainless steel version.

products.short_description: Special liquid descaler for steam generators. 5 kg canister (approx. 3.97 l). Designed for SteamRock steam generators.
products.full_description: Special liquid descaler for steam generators. 5 kg canister (approx. 3.97 l). Designed for SteamRock steam generators. NOTICE: dangerous goods class (phosphoric acid solution), special delivery requirements may apply.

products.short_description: Speaker in special waterproof construction for installation and use in steam rooms or high humidity environment. Balanced frequency response, high efficiency and good high-midrange reproduction.
products.full_description: Speaker in special waterproof construction for installation and use in steam rooms or high humidity environment. Balanced frequency response, high efficiency and good high-midrange reproduction. 80 W power output (100 W peak) at 4 Ohm, Ø 16 cm (6.5“), 2-way coaxial speaker with moulded plastic cone, plastic basket and grille. Corrosion-resistant and waterproof (encased magnet, silicone-coated leads). Additional tweeter centred in compass design. White front cover. Alternatively available with elegant matt black finish. Class protection IP65, -40 °C to 80 °C, salt water resistant. 60 - 20.000 Hz, 86 dB mean sound pressure level.

products.short_description: Digital temperature sensor in a stainless steel housing, sensor bus system. Connection cable is not included!
products.full_description: Digital temperature sensor in a stainless steel housing, sensor bus system. Connection cable is not included! Compatible with the following control units:

products.short_description: Professional grade peristaltic pump, up to 5 l/h dosing capacity, with robust metal housing in anthracite pearl effect finish for wall-mounting. Requires external control signal.
products.full_description: Professional grade peristaltic pump, up to 5 l/h dosing capacity, with robust metal housing in anthracite pearl effect finish for wall-mounting. Requires external control signal. Power supply 220 - 240 V 50Hz. 8 W power rating.

products.short_description: 5 l container with level probe for SteamRock steam generators.
products.full_description: 5 l container with level probe for SteamRock steam generators.

products.short_description: SBM-Aroma – for SteamRock Premium with EOS EmoTouch 3 . Set with push button (metal housing, flush-mounting installation, blue illumination ring), connection cable 5 m, electronic unit.
products.full_description: SBM-Aroma – for SteamRock Premium with EOS EmoTouch 3 . Set with push button (metal housing, flush-mounting installation, blue illumination ring), connection cable 5 m, electronic unit. Aroma Button – for EOS Econ S2 . Button as above, with cable 5m.

products.short_description: Compact floor-standing model with electronic control unit and salt container.
products.full_description: Compact floor-standing model with electronic control unit and salt container. Available in two versions to suit 1-6 persons (AKE 40) or 8-20 persons (AKE 120) households. Flow rate: - AKE40 - 2400 l/h - AKE120g - 3000 l/h Salt container: - AKE40 - 40 kg - AKE120 - 80 kg Salt consumption: - AKE40 - 2,4 kg salt, ~84 l water. - AKE120 - 7,2 kg salt, ~144 l water. AKE40: 670 x 320 x 520 mm AKE120: 1250 x 320 x 520 mm

products.full_description: SBM-Aroma – for SteamRock Premium with EOS EmoTouch 3 . Set with push button (metal housing, flush-mounting installation, blue illumination ring), connection cable 5 m, electronic unit. Aroma Button – for EOS Econ S2 . Button as above, with cable 5m.

products.short_description: The affordable yet reliable steam generator is a great choice for compact or middle size steam rooms. Recommended for residential use.
products.full_description: The affordable yet reliable steam generator is a great choice for compact or middle size steam rooms. Recommended for residential use. EOS SteamAttrac can also be used as an auxiliary steam source in large saunas with humid operation. Furthermore, it can be enhanced with various options. Special technical solutions possible upon request, e.g. for use on ships. Requires an external control un it - EOS E con S2 , LSG Steam for EOS EmoTouch 3 . For further information and specifications, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Attention: Not suitable for EOS SteamRock II Premium ​​​​​​​.

products.short_description: Made of special heat-resistant plastic. With enlarged holder for essences. Connection 1 ¼“ external thread.
products.full_description: Made of special heat-resistant plastic. With enlarged holder for essences. Connection 1 ¼“ external thread. With optimized steam flow deflection for increased safety.

products.source_name: EOS LED Spot matt stainless steel Warm-white light type (3000 K)
products.short_description: LED spots for use in saunas , infrared cabins , steam rooms and hammams . Elegant round-shape slim size housing with pre-mounted 2 m connection cable allows fast and easy installation.
products.full_description: LED spots for use in saunas , infrared cabins , steam rooms and hammams . Elegant round-shape slim size housing with pre-mounted 2 m connection cable allows fast and easy installation. Elegant, timeless design. Metal housing, matt nickel. Also available with elegant matt black finish. 4 W / 24 V ⎓. Protection class IP65. Heat resistant up to at least 140 °C, electronic protection of LED chips (automatic reduction of the light intensity at 110 °C). Ø62 mm cut-out, installation depth 50 mm 630 lm (White light type) 290 lm (RGB type)

products.short_description: Special technical solutions possible upon request, e.g. for use on ships.
products.full_description: Special technical solutions possible upon request, e.g. for use on ships. Robust, durable construction with quality heating elements. Very fast steam production, high efficiency. The power output may be quickly adjusted on site - from 18 kW to 3 kW in 3 kW steps. Flexible installation thanks to variable steam outlet. Water tank made entirely of stainless steel, separately replaceable heating elements. Fully automatic operation with overheating protection. Integrated automatic descaling system (cleaning and descaling). Delivery includes a 5 l container with level probe for descaler liquid. Suitable control unit - e.g. LSG Steam for EOS EmoTouch 3 , EOS Econ S2 . EOS SteamRock II Premium : Luxury class steam generator with high-performance quality heating elements for steam rooms. Built-in descaling and automatic cleaning system. With control unit – including Built-in essence dosing system for two fragrances. The power output may be quickly adjusted on site. Flexible installation thanks to variable, extra-large 1 1/4 “steam outlet for efficient operation. Volt-free outputs for bench and floor heating. Outputs for two fans and light (dimmable). High-performance steam generator for steam rooms. Luxury class steam generator with high-performance quality heating elements and optional control system for steam rooms. 28 kg / 30 kg (Basic) 29 kg / 31 kg (Premium) Für weitere Informationen stehen wir Ihnen gerne zur Verfügung.

products.full_description: LED spots for use in saunas , infrared cabins , steam rooms and hammams . Very simple and quick installation and mounting. Includes pre-mounted 2 m connection cable. Elegant, timeless design. Housing made of aluminum, silver glossy anodized. Also available in black. Beam angle approx. 60°. Heat resistant up to at least 140 °C, electronic protection of LED chips (automatic reduction of the light intensity at 110 °C). The spots are available individually or in sets of 5, as RGB or warm white version. Ø35 mm cut-out, installation depth 45 mm Warm-white light type (3000 K) set 5 spots
